agentRecommendation.reasoning: 6960x4640 — highest-resolution Point Nepean landscape on Commons. GPS-tagged to Cheviot Hill. Shows the tip-of-the-peninsula geography with water visible. Sep 2025, very fresh. Philip Mallis is an established Melbourne photographer. SA licence requires editor override.

rejected.note: Sand dunes image is strong but candidate A shows the geography better.
Strongest geographic argument but lower resolution than A.

editorOverrides.reason: CC-BY-SA 4.0 accepted for this slot — SA obligation attaches to the image file and its direct derivatives, not surrounding page code. This override applies only if the editor approves the SA policy across Tier A.

notes: AWAITING EDITOR SIGNATURE. Contingent on CC-BY-SA policy approval. Candidate D reserved for Week 3 twinning.

implementerAction.altText: Looking out towards the waves near Cheviot Hill at Point Nepean
implementerAction.caption: The view from Cheviot Hill, Point Nepean.
